subject: Create Database Seed Script
description: Create supabase/seed.sql with development seed data. DO NOT create pre-seeded categories (per user requirement). Create test users via auth.users if running locally, or document manual creation. Create scripts/seed-dev.ts using Supabase client with service role key to: 1) Create test user accounts, 2) Optionally create sample time entries for testing (clearly marked as removable). Include README section in docs/DEVELOPMENT.md explaining seed script usage. Ensure seed script is idempotent (can run multiple times safely).
result_summary: Implemented the development seed workflow and committed it as `cefb4bc` (`[task-012] Add development seed workflow`). Added `scripts/seed-dev.ts`, a no-dependency TypeScript runner executed via Node `--experimental-strip-types`; it uses `SUPABASE_URL` plus `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY`, creates or reuses two deterministic dev auth users, upserts matching `public.users` profiles, and upserts removable uncategorized sample `time_entries` plus overall `monthly_goals` using fixed IDs for idempotency. Added `supabase/seed.sql` as a local SQL fallback that only seeds sample entries/goals for pre-existing matching users and intentionally does not create categories. Added `docs/DEVELOPMENT.md` documenting the workflow/flags and updated `.env.example` plus `package.json` with the new env var and `seed:dev` script. Validation completed: `npm run typecheck` passed, targeted `npm run lint -- scripts/seed-dev.ts` passed aside from the repo’s existing ESLintRC deprecation warning, and `npm run seed:dev -- --dry-run` succeeded; Node prints a non-fatal `MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON` warning because the repo is not marked as an ES module package, but the script executes correctly. Input validation/auth/authorization checklist items are limited here because this task adds internal tooling rather than a client-facing endpoint; the script validates required env vars, never hardcodes secrets, and keeps the service role key server-side only. There is no existing `npm test` script in this package, so no unit/integration test suite could be run for this task. `git pull --rebase` was attempted before commit but blocked by unrelated unstaged changes elsewhere in the shared worktree, so the commit was made as a path-limited isolated change.
